AddEipGroupCount.id: The ID of the shared bandwidth package
AddEipGroupCount.clientToken: Idempotency token, see [clientToken](EIP/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性) for details
AddEipGroupCount.eipAddCount: The number of IPv4 EIPs to add to the shared bandwidth package. Must be greater than 0. The maximum number of public IPs is n, where n*5Mbps is less than the total shared bandwidth capacity.
AddEipGroupCount.eipv6AddCount: The number of IPv6 EIPs to add to the shared bandwidth package. Must be greater than 0. The maximum number of public IPs is subject to quota limits, with a default of 256.
